name: std-event-log
description: std-event-log — generic chronological event feed (Stripe activity log / GitHub PR timeline / Linear event feed style). Renders a vertical `timeline` with type-coded dots, a single horizontal chip-bar of kind filters (All + per-kind), reverse-chronological sort, and an inline form for logging events that weren't auto-captured. `config.kindOptions` maps each kind → status/icon/label so consuming molecules/organisms get type-coded visuals without re-implementing topology. Topology = loading / viewing / backfilling / error.

schema.name: std-event-log
schema.description: std-event-log — generic chronological event feed (Stripe activity log / GitHub PR timeline / Linear event feed style). Renders a vertical `timeline` with type-coded dots, a single horizontal chip-bar of kind filters (All + per-kind), reverse-chronological sort, and an inline form for logging events that weren't auto-captured. `config.kindOptions` maps each kind → status/icon/label so consuming molecules/organisms get type-coded visuals without re-implementing topology. Topology = loading / viewing / backfilling / error.

fields.name: title
fields.description: The descriptive name or heading for the event log.

fields.name: description
fields.description: A human-readable explanation of the event.

fields.name: kind
fields.description: The type of event being logged.
fields.synonyms: event type, event category, kind, status

fields.name: date
fields.description: The timestamp associated with the event.

fields.name: allEntries
fields.description: An array of log entry objects.

fields.name: entries
fields.description: A list of log entries, each with associated data.

fields.name: filterChips
fields.description: Represents selectable filter options for event categories.

fields.name: filterKind
fields.description: The type of filter currently applied to the event log.

fields.name: backfillTitle
fields.description: A descriptive title for a manually added event.
fields.synonyms: manual title, user-provided title, custom title

fields.name: backfillDescription
fields.description: A textual explanation for the event backfill process.

fields.name: backfillDate
fields.description: The date and time when the event was manually added.

fields.name: backfillKind
fields.description: Specifies the category or type of the manually added event.

fields.name: errorMessage
fields.description: A human-readable message indicating an error condition.

emits.description: Signals a filter has been applied to the event log.
Initiates a backfill operation to retrieve historical events.
Indicates successful completion of backfill data saving.
Signals the event log has finished loading.
Indicates that loading the event log failed.
Indicates a new event has been successfully logged.
Indicates that saving an event failed.

events.name: Event log loaded
events.description: Signals the event log has finished loading.

events.name: Event log load failed
events.description: Indicates that loading the event log failed.

events.name: Event log saved
events.description: Indicates a new event has been successfully logged.

events.name: Event log save failed
events.description: Indicates that saving an event failed.

events.name: Apply Filter
events.description: Signals a filter has been applied to the event log.

events.name: Open Backfill
events.description: Initiates a backfill operation to retrieve historical events.

events.name: Save Backfill
events.description: Indicates successful completion of backfill data saving.

formFields.label: Backfill fields
formFields.description: Inputs shown in the form for manually logging missed events

kindOptions.label: Event kinds
kindOptions.description: Maps each event kind to its label, icon, and status color

timelineLook.label: Timeline look
timelineLook.description: Layer 2 visual treatment for the timeline.

title.label: Section title
title.description: Heading shown above the activity timeline

cardLook.label: Card look
cardLook.description: Layer 2 visual treatment for cards rendered by this atom.
